title: Screaming
wikitext:
[]: Screaming...? Post by StraightEdge » Thu Feb 16, 2012 11:57 pm In the Middle of watching 2.22, At the part where 01 is rejecting the dummy plug and something caught my attention. The quick scene where 01 ejects the dummy plug why does the dummy plug seem to shake and emit what sounds like a masculine scream? (at this part 01 isn't growling or anything its self) the camera even seems to somewhat focus on the dummy plug as it shakes and screams. whats up with this?

[]: Post by Sgt. Griff » Fri Feb 17, 2012 12:57 am Already posted, but whatever. We can probably assume that the Dummy system is more human than not (requiring mind, soul etc...) So that reaction could probably just be the reaction to a mental rejection/attack.

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Feb 17, 2012 2:27 am http://forum.evageeks.org/post/358117/Interesting-little-details-in-2XX/#358117

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Fri Feb 17, 2012 2:27 am 1) This should be in the Rebuild Sub-forum. 2) There are a number of threads that already discuss this, please remember to use the search function before creating a new thread. 3) Best place to discuss at the moment would be here: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/post/358220/Interesting-little-details-in-2XX/[/url] EDIT: 4) Ornette beat me to it.
